title: Prevent Certificate Enrollment with arbitrary Application Policies (ESC15)
remediation:
1. Identify the vulnerable certificate templates:
-Remove enrollment permission for unprivileged users.
-Disable the “Supply in the request” option.
2. Identify the AD CS servers which are vulnerable to CVE-2024-49019 and apply the relevant patch.
remediationImpact: Vulnerable certificate template allows non-privileged users to issue a certificate that can be used for authenticating as high-privileged user.
